source_name: Retail pump price - E10 public-feed average
notes: Multi-state E10 average weighted by station count. QLD: 891 stations, avg 189.3 c/L, source date 2026-02-28. NSW contributes only when NSW_FUELCHECK_API_KEY is configured.
source_rights: Mixed state government terms; verify each source before reuse
citation: NSW FuelCheck; Queensland Government Open Data Fuel Price Reporting.

states.detail: Queensland Open Data E10 latest public monthly file: Queensland Fuel Prices February 2026
